evidence: Late orders are reviewed weekly by operations leadership
The organization has defined an on-time fulfillment KPI
business_value.notes: The decision owner is identified, but the target improvement is not yet approved.

evidence: Two years of order-header and fulfillment-event history are available
Order identifiers can be joined across the source systems
Operations managers retain authority over interventions
The proposed output is advisory rather than autonomous
The use case excludes employment and customer-credit decisions
A named owner will review false-positive impacts
risk_governance.notes: A formal rollback criterion still needs approval.

evidence: A data engineer has been assigned for discovery
delivery_readiness.notes: Production monitoring ownership is not assigned.

evidence: Data-volume estimates were checked against source extracts
evidence_quality.notes: No baseline model or decision-impact benchmark exists yet.
